userStories.title: Fluxo NF no PDV + fila NF no supervisor
Supplier schema + server actions + tela /admin/fornecedores
userStories.description: As a stock manager, I want to register and manage suppliers so that I can link them to purchase orders.
acceptanceCriteria: Supplier model: id @default(cuid()), name, cnpj?, phone?, email?, contactName?, notes?, active Boolean @default(true), createdAt
src/lib/actions/suppliers.ts exports createSupplier, updateSupplier, toggleSupplierStatus, listSuppliers (optional search on name OR cnpj)
createSupplier validates cnpj uniqueness if provided (strip non-digits)
/admin/fornecedores page: async server component passes suppliers to SuppliersContent
SuppliersContent rewritten: table (name, cnpj, phone, email, status), modal (name, cnpj, phone, email, contactName, notes), edit, toggle status, client-side search
Sidebar: /admin/fornecedores href already in place
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Combined schema+screen since Supplier is simple. Rewrite existing SuppliersContent (currently mock-based). cnpj is optional and stored as raw digits.

userStories.title: StockReceipt schema + server actions (nota fiscal de entrada)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want StockReceipt and StockReceiptItem models and server actions to manage purchase receipts from draft to confirmed.
acceptanceCriteria: StockReceiptStatus enum: draft | confirmed | cancelled

StockReceipt model: id @default(cuid()), code String @unique (NE-XXXXXX), supplierId? (FK optional), supplierName?, invoiceNumber?, status StockReceiptStatus @default(draft), notes?, totalCost Float @default(0), confirmedAt?, createdAt
StockReceiptItem model: id @default(cuid()), stockReceiptId (FK), productId (FK), productName String (snapshot), quantity Float, unitCost Float, total Float
Supplier model gets stockReceipts StockReceiptItem[] via StockReceipt (no direct relation — supplierId is String?)
Product model gets receiptItems StockReceiptItem[] relation
StockReceipt gets items StockReceiptItem[] relation
src/lib/actions/stock-receipts.ts exports: createStockReceipt, addReceiptItem, removeReceiptItem, confirmStockReceipt, cancelStockReceipt, listStockReceipts
createStockReceipt: generates code NE- + sequence padded (uses db count for sequence), creates draft
addReceiptItem: validates product exists, adds item (productName snapshot), recalculates totalCost
removeReceiptItem: removes item, recalculates totalCost
confirmStockReceipt: validates status=draft, db.$transaction: creates StockEntry (entrada) per item + updates StockReceipt to confirmed + confirmedAt
cancelStockReceipt: validates status=draft, updates to cancelled
listStockReceipts: optional status filter, ordered by createdAt desc, includes items count
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on Supplier (US-020) and Product. supplierId is optional string FK — receipt can be created without a supplier. productName stored as snapshot so receipt history is preserved if product is renamed.

userStories.title: Tela /admin/compras — nota fiscal de entrada UI
userStories.description: As a stock manager, I want to create and manage purchase receipts (NF de entrada) with draft/confirm flow.
acceptanceCriteria: /admin/compras page: async server component passes receipts + suppliers + products to PurchasesContent
PurchasesContent rewritten: table of receipts (code, supplier, invoiceNumber, status, totalCost, date, actions)
Status badges: draft=slate, confirmed=emerald, cancelled=red
Nova NF button opens create modal: optional supplier select, invoiceNumber?, notes?
Click on draft receipt row expands detail: list of items (product, qty, unitCost, total), add-item form (product select + qty + unitCost), remove item button
Confirmar button on draft receipt calls confirmStockReceipt — row updates to confirmed
Cancelar button on draft receipt calls cancelStockReceipt
Confirmed and cancelled receipts are read-only (no add/remove items)
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on US-021. Products for item selection come from db.product.findMany(active). Supplier list for select comes from listSuppliers(). Client-side state for expanded receipt row.

userStories.title: Dashboard financeiro /admin/financeiro — DRE simplificado
userStories.description: As a financeiro user, I want a dashboard showing revenue, costs, and payment breakdown so I can understand the business performance.
acceptanceCriteria: /admin/financeiro page: async server component queries real DB data
Period filter: today | week | month (default month) — passed as searchParam
Summary cards: Total de Vendas (sum Sale.total where finished), Ticket Médio, Qtd Vendas, Total Descontos
Payment breakdown table: por método (cash/pix/debit/credit/store_credit) — sum SalePayment.amount grouped by method

DRE simplificado: Receita Bruta (subtotal sum), Descontos (discount sum), Receita Líquida (total sum), Custo de Mercadorias (sum StockEntry.quantity * Product.costPrice where type=saida in period), Margem Bruta
Session summary: total open CashSessions in period, list of sessions (register, operator, total_sales)
FinanceContent receives all data as props from server component
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Depends on existing Sale, SalePayment, StockEntry models. Period filter uses URL searchParams (not useState) so filter is shareable/bookmarkable. Custo de Mercadorias is approximated via StockEntry quantity × costPrice at current price — acceptable for MVP.

userStories.title: Telas de leitura /admin/vendas e /admin/caixas para role financeiro
userStories.description: As a financeiro user, I want read-only views of all sales and cash sessions so I can audit and reconcile.
acceptanceCriteria: /admin/vendas: async server component lists all Sale (finished) ordered by finishedAt desc, with code, operator, total, items count, payment methods

/admin/caixas: async server component lists all CashSession ordered by openedAt desc, with register, operator, status, openingBalance, closingBalance, total_sales (sum of sales.total), opened/closed times
Both pages use AdminShell, simple table layout, no mutations (read-only)
Middleware: add '/admin/vendas' and '/admin/caixas' to financeiro ROLE_ROUTES
Sidebar: add 'Caixas (fin.)' and 'Vendas (fin.)' items for financeiro + admin, OR use existing items
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Standalone — only reads existing Sale and CashSession data. /admin/caixas is different from /caixas (operator screen). /admin/vendas shows ALL sales, not just current session. Sidebar items for financeiro already point to /admin/vendas and /admin/caixas — need to implement the pages.

userStories.title: Relatorios /admin/relatorios — tabela de vendas + exportacao CSV
userStories.description: As a financeiro user, I want to view a sales report by period and export it as CSV.
acceptanceCriteria: /admin/relatorios: async server component with period filter (searchParams)
Report table: code, date, operator, cashRegister, items, subtotal, discount, total, payment methods
Period filter: today | week | month | custom (date range inputs)
CSV export: client-side Blob download — no server round-trip, no new dependency
CSV columns: Codigo, Data, Operador, Caixa, Itens, Subtotal, Desconto, Total, Pagamentos
ReportsContent receives sales data as props, handles CSV download client-side with Blob+URL.createObjectURL
Existing ReportsContent rewritten (currently mock-based)
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: CSV export uses browser Blob API — no @react-pdf/renderer or external lib needed. Format: UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility (\uFEFF prefix). Period filter via searchParams same as US-023.
